name: Data Model Extender
description: Reads the context-scan contract (read-contract mode) then designs the database schema extension. Uses soft-align to synchronise with api-design before publishing the migration plan.

checks.prompt: Review the lib directory structure and identify the data persistence patterns: (1) what data structures are persisted, (2) serialisation approach, (3) ID generation convention, (4) timestamp fields convention. This shapes the new feature's data model extension.
checks.fail: ⚠️  Data pattern analysis returned limited findings

checks.prompt: Design the database schema extension for the new feature: (1) new table(s) with columns and types, (2) foreign key relationships to existing tables, (3) required indexes, (4) migration steps (up + down). Context: {retryContext}
checks.pass: ✅ Schema extension and migration plan designed
